body.description: Body of the mail, only html format, even newlines expects

functionDeclarations.name: lists_messages
functionDeclarations.description: Lists unread Gmail messages for the authenticated user matching optional search filters.

userId.description: The user's email address. The special value 'me' indicates the authenticated user.

q.description: Optional search query to refine unread messages (e.g., 'from:boss@company.com').

functionDeclarations.name: read_message_details
functionDeclarations.description: Retrieves the sender, subject, body, and headers of a specific Gmail message by its messageID.

id.description: The unique immutable ID of the message to retrieve.

functionDeclarations.name: trash_gmail_message
functionDeclarations.description: Moves a specific Gmail message to the trash folder using its message ID.

id.description: The unique alphanumeric ID of the Gmail message to trash.

functionDeclarations.name: trash_automation
functionDeclarations.description: To initiate a process that deletes unwanted/unuseful mails.

functionDeclarations.name: read_contacts_list
functionDeclarations.description: gets a list of contacts with name and mail address.

functionDeclarations.name: save_contact
functionDeclarations.description: saves a new contact with name and email address.

name.description: name of contact, can be firstname from mail address

functionDeclarations.name: execute_commands
functionDeclarations.description: execute any command in the windows command prompt like create folders/file, read/write files etc.. in current directory as root.

command.description: command to execute on windows command prompt

functionDeclarations.name: save_category
functionDeclarations.description: saves the category of the mail

category.description: category of mail, expects one of 'Promotional','Rejection','Other'.

functionDeclarations.name: save_scratchpad
functionDeclarations.description: Overwrites the current scratchpad content with a new set of thoughts, approach ideas, or reasoning steps.

content.description: The full text content representing the LLM's current internal thoughts, strategies, and notes.

functionDeclarations.name: append_task
functionDeclarations.description: Appends a new task to the task management system with a specified description and status.

id.description: The unique identifier for the task.

task_description.description: The detailed description of the work to be done.

status.description: The current state of the task.

functionDeclarations.name: update_task
functionDeclarations.description: Updates the details or status of an existing task in the system.

id.description: The unique identifier of the task to update.

task_description.description: The updated description of the task.

status.description: The updated state of the task.

functionDeclarations.name: read_tasks
functionDeclarations.description: Retrieves a list of tasks items, optionally filtered by their current status.

status.description: Filter tasks by this specific state.
